chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 385 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.5747/2023 (C/A) 29.11.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to appoint him on the basis of deceased quota as per scheme of Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, in accordance with law. However, the comments show that this very rule is not applicable in the case of petitioner as his father was a public servant employed in Town Committee, Kandhra. Faced with this proposition, learned Counsel submits that he would be satisfied if the listed application is disposed of by directing the respondents to consider the case of petitioner on humanitarian basis. This request appears to be reasonable, and this listed application is disposed of. Town Committee, Kandhra may consider the case of the petitioner for appointment on humanitarian ground. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
